changes.value:
**Files:** `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/task_commands.rs`, `entity_commands.rs`, `column_commands.rs`

**What:** Every command `execute()` repeats the same 3-line pattern: create `KanbanOperationProcessor::new()`, call `process(&op, &kanban).await`, `map_err(|e| CommandError::ExecutionFailed(e.to_string()))`. This appears 9+ times.

**Why:** DRY violation. If the processor creation pattern changes (e.g., adding a cache argument), all 9 sites must be updated.

**Fix:** Extract a helper function:
```rust
async fn run_op<O: Operation>(op: &O, kanban: &KanbanContext) -> Result<Value> {
    KanbanOperationProcessor::new()
        .process(op, kanban)
        .await
        .map_err(|e| CommandError::ExecutionFailed(e.to_string()))
}
```

- [ ] Add `run_op` helper to `commands/mod.rs`
- [ ] Replace all 9 repetitions
- [ ] Verify tests pass"
Extract shared helper for KanbanOperationProcessor boilerplate
